events.name: Economic Crisis
flavor: Banks collapse as markets spiral out of control.
The currency crashes overnight, devastating the economy.
Unemployment skyrockets as industries collapse.
A financial scandal shakes investor confidence to its core.

events.name: Famine
flavor: Crop failures leave millions starving.
Food shortages spread across the nation.
A devastating famine grips the country as supplies run dry.
Hunger spreads as food distribution networks collapse.

events.name: Civil War
flavor: Rebel factions seize control of key cities.
The government struggles to maintain order as civil war erupts.
Armed militias tear the country apart from within.
Brother fights brother as the nation descends into chaos.

events.name: Epidemic
flavor: A deadly disease spreads rapidly through the population.
Hospitals overflow as an epidemic tears through the nation.
A mysterious illness decimates entire communities.
Quarantine zones are established as the outbreak spirals.

events.name: Drought
flavor: Rivers run dry as a historic drought grips the nation.
Crops wither under a relentless sun.
Water rationing is introduced as reservoirs hit record lows.
Years of drought leave farmland barren and unproductive.

events.name: Coup
flavor: Military generals seize power in a sudden coup.
The government is overthrown in a violent power grab.
A shadowy faction takes control of the capital overnight.
The president is deposed as tanks roll through the streets.

events.name: Sanctions
flavor: International sanctions cripple the nation's trade.
Exports grind to a halt as sanctions bite hard.
Foreign assets are frozen as sanctions are imposed.
The economy reels under the weight of international pressure.

events.name: Natural Disaster
flavor: A massive earthquake levels entire cities.
Catastrophic flooding displaces millions.
A powerful hurricane devastates the coastline.
A volcanic eruption forces mass evacuations.

events.name: Military Desertion
flavor: Thousands of soldiers abandon their posts overnight.
Morale collapses as desertion spreads through the ranks.
Entire battalions lay down their arms and walk away.
The army crumbles as soldiers flee en masse.

events.name: Economic Boom
flavor: A booming economy lifts millions out of poverty.
Record growth transforms the nation into a regional powerhouse.
Foreign investment floods in as the economy takes off.
A golden era of prosperity reshapes the country.

events.name: Population Boom
flavor: A baby boom swells the population to record numbers.
Immigration surges as the nation attracts workers from abroad.
Birth rates soar as living conditions improve dramatically.
A demographic explosion reshapes the nation's future.

events.name: Military Expansion
flavor: A massive military buildup doubles the size of the armed forces.
Conscription drives swell the ranks of the army.
New weapons programs transform the nation's military might.
Defence spending soars as the military expands rapidly.

events.name: Technological Leap
flavor: A breakthrough in weapons technology reshapes the battlefield.
Scientists unlock new technologies that transform the economy.
A technological revolution puts the nation decades ahead.
Innovation drives explosive growth in both industry and defence.

events.name: Golden Age
flavor: A golden age of prosperity and power dawns.
History will remember this era as the nation's finest hour.
Art, science and military might flourish in equal measure.
The nation enters an unprecedented period of dominance.

events.name: Oil Discovery
flavor: Vast oil reserves are discovered, transforming the economy overnight.
Black gold flows as a massive oil field is struck.
An oil boom sends the economy into overdrive.
The discovery of oil reserves catapults the nation to wealth.

events.name: Alliance Bonus
flavor: A powerful alliance bolsters the nation's military strength.
Foreign troops arrive to reinforce the armed forces.
A new military pact brings weapons and training from abroad.
Allied support transforms the nation's defensive capabilities.

events.name: Agricultural Revolution
flavor: New farming techniques triple crop yields overnight.
An agricultural revolution ends food insecurity for millions.
Fertile lands are unlocked as irrigation transforms the countryside.
Advances in agriculture fuel both population and economic growth.

events.name: Trade Boom
flavor: New trade routes open up, flooding the economy with wealth.
Exports surge as demand for the nation's goods skyrockets.
A trade agreement unlocks vast new markets abroad.
Merchants grow rich as commerce booms across the nation.

events.name: Military Innovation
flavor: A new generation of weapons gives the army a decisive edge.
Military doctrine is revolutionised by a tactical breakthrough.
Advanced armaments pour off the production lines.
A military genius reshapes the nation's armed forces.
